contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Add error visibility to onboarding email batch sender (processBatch)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/257
  
  Details:
  Hardened processBatch() in qr_code_web_service.gs against the silent-failure class that caused today's repeat-onboarding-email symptom: setValue on column M succeeds without throwing but the cell stays empty (formula in M1 overwriting, data validation rejection, or protected-range overlay), so the next trigger re-picks the row and re-sends the email. Three layers added: per-email try/catch (one user's failure doesn't abort the batch), SpreadsheetApp.flush() + read-back verification of column M with an explicit error naming the three likely causes, and an alert email to garyjob@agroverse.shop summarising every failure plus a final re-throw so GAS marks the trigger run as failed (which fires the standard 'Notify me on trigger failure' email). Logger.log summary line on every run for green-run diagnosability. Awaiting clasp push to the admin@truesight.me project to deploy.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
